  • 06/05/26 Whitesands Quarry 1 (Lukasz Pulawski) "Male still. Gone to roost."
  • 06/05/26 Whitesands Quarry 1 (Liam Morrison) "Seen briefly; bird that has been around for the past day"
  • 06/05/26 Whitesands Quarry 1 (Rosie Filipiak) "See photo tbu"
  • 06/05/26 Whitesands Quarry 1 (Andrew Latham) "Present for second day"
  • 06/05/26 Whitesands Quarry 1 (Sandeep Ramalingam) "Have photos. Here since yesterday"
  • 06/05/26 Whitesands Quarry 1 (Sam Shutt) "Known bird. Actively hunting on the fence line by the settling ponds. Photographed."
  • 06/05/26 EH42, East Lothian GB-Scotland (55.9913,-2.4751) 1 (Owen Chiang) "one individual seen"
  • 06/05/26 EH42, East Lothian GB-Scotland (55.9913,-2.4751) 1 (Vicky Yeung) "one individual seen"
  • 06/05/26 Whitesands Quarry 1 (Richard Drew) "Male. Widely reported on BIS."
  • 06/05/26 Whitesands Quarry 1 (Jimmy Hair) "Twitched. Seen by many. Chestnut head and black eye stripe to eye but not to bill, with white throat and white underparts tinted light chestnut"
  • 06/05/26 Whitesands 1 (James Porter) "Well reported + observed bird, feeding along fence line. Record shots tba."
  • 06/05/26 Whitesands Quarry 1 (Shawn Waddoups) "Brown head unmistakable. As documented."
  • 06/05/26 Balancing Pools, Whitesands 1 (Ian Murray) "Well documented"
  • 06/05/26 Whitesands Quarry 1 (Zixuan Luo) "well documented"
